allow: Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); console.log\('Zod version:', z.z?.version || 'unknown'\); const s = z.z || z; const schema = s.array\(s.object\({ name: s.string\(\).min\(1\), brand: s.string\(\).nullable\(\), category_id: s.string\(\).uuid\(\).nullable\(\), condition: s.enum\(['new','like_new','good','fair','poor']\), weight: s.number\(\).nullable\(\) }\)\).min\(1\).max\(50\); const result = schema.safeParse\([{name:'Test',brand:'Osprey',category_id:null,condition:'good',weight:1.5}]\); console.log\('Parse success:', result.success\); if\(!result.success\) console.log\('Error:', JSON.stringify\(result.error.issues, null, 2\)\);")
